'''Esala''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] native to the [[Undercity (Taris)|Undercity]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].

==Biography==
She was the village healer. Lacking any serum, she was forced to keep the victims infected with the [[rakghoul]] disease in a pen until they had mutated and destroyed each other. She was very impressed when [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] managed to procure some serum from a dead [[Sith trooper (Sith Empire)|Sith trooper]] and cure two of the victims before their mutation, allowing them to return to society.

She, like all the Outcasts, left the village for the [[Promised Land]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
